_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Express Zenith
project.address: Plot No. GH-02A, Sector 77, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.tagline: Crafted Spaces Next to Sector 76 Metro
project.description: Premium ready-to-move apartments and penthouses in Sector 77, Noida, featuring G+19 towers and direct walking access to the metro.
project.long_description: Express Zenith in Sector 77, Noida stands out as an exemplary ready-to-move-in residential development that masterfully balances urban transit convenience with expansive lifestyle spaces. Rising G+19 floors across 6 magnificent high-rise towers, this 5.5-acre development houses 835 units with 75% of the acreage reserved for beautifully manicured central greens. Engineered with high-strength structural specifications, the society provides superior earthquake-resistant stability. Residents enjoy a luxurious clubhouse called 'Club Prana' featuring a state-of-the-art wellness studio, sundecks, and a swimming pool. Strategically positioned just 500 meters from the Sector 76 Aqua Line Metro Station and directly connected to NH-24 and the FNG corridor, the project offers unmatched daily accessibility and robust rent-yield efficiency for discerning families and executives.
marketing_claims: State-of-the-art Club Prana with grand facilities
Premium towers overlooking Sector 77 Green Belt
Duplexes and penthouses with private terrace provisions
Fully delivered and inhabited with over 650 families

builder.name: Express Builders and Developers
builder.company_overview: Express Builders (Express Builders & Promoters Pvt. Ltd.) was established in 1980 with a vision to inject deep professionalism, transparent title clearances, and structural integrity into the real estate landscape of India. Over nearly four decades, the group has compiled a credible reputation for executing premium housing and retail centers across northern India. They are renowned for structural engineering stability, high-grade material specifications, and zero legal title defaults.

unit_types.name: 2 BHK (Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 2 BHK next to Metro
unit_types.description: An exceptionally designed 2 BHK residence maximizing natural light, with two private balconies overlooking landscaped green courtyards.
whats_included: High-grade vitrified tiles in all living spaces
Concealed copper wiring with modular switches
Modular kitchen platform with deep stainless steel sink

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Elite)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with extensive balconies
unit_types.description: A magnificent three-bedroom layout that features premium spacing, three attached bathrooms, and wrap-around balconies optimized for panoramic city skyline views.
whats_included: Anti-skid premium flooring in kitchens and balconies
Laminated wooden flooring in Master Bedroom
Split A/C copper conduit ready piping

unit_types.name: 4 BHK Duplex (Royal)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial Duplex with Private Terrace Space
unit_types.description: The absolute crown jewel of Express Zenith, featuring a massive G+1 layout with double-height ceilings, a dedicated servant unit, walk-in closets, and an expansive personal terrace sundeck.
whats_included: Full imported Italian marble flooring in major halls
Dedicated master bedroom floor with personal jacuzzi
High-end modular kitchen with granite and quartz finishes

assumptions: All pricing reflects secondary market resale rates and current broker registers for Sector 77 as of Q3 2026.
GST is completely 0.0% for ready-to-move-in assets where Completion Certificate (CC) has been issued.
Registration and stamp duties follow Uttar Pradesh state circle guidelines at final execution.

payment_plan.notes: Customized based on bank NOC schedules and individual mortgage approvals.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Express Zenith is an exceptionally secure ready-to-move-in property in Sector 77 Noida, combining premium build quality and active registrations with an unbeatable 5-minute walk to the Sector 76 Aqua Line Metro.
why_buy: Optimal Metro Proximity: Located just 500 meters from Sector 76 Metro Station, eliminating daily commuting friction.
Excellent Builder Trust: Express Builders holds a flawless structural and litigation record over 40+ years.
Active and Clean Title: 100% registries are active with zero pending legal disputes from Noida Authority.
why_avoid: Slightly Premium Entry: Pricing carries a localized premium due to the walk-to-metro convenience.
G+19 Density: At 151 units per acre, common areas are highly active during peak weekend hours.
decision_profile.best_for: Corporate executives working in Sector 62/63, families prioritizing hassle-free registrations, and active metro commuters.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative flippers or buyers seeking isolated, ultra-low density luxury estates.

buyerPersonas.headline: Zero-Friction Daily Commute
reasons: 5-minute walk to Aqua Line Metro linking to Noida Expressway and Central Delhi.

buyerPersonas.headline: Flawless Title Safety
reasons: Complete RERA safety, clean bi-partite Noida Authority lease deed, instant registry.
Express Builders has zero historic construction litigation.

riskRadar.description: Completely physical handovers done. Zero construction risk.
Registries active, escrow maintained correctly, zero litigation flags.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Driven by sector maturity, commercial offices nearby, and proximity to Spectrum Mall.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly popular renting hub among IT staff due to walking distance to Sector 76 metro.
investment_insights.market_desc: Consistent high resale demand for ready blocks.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Highly liquid. Units trade rapidly due to metro connectivity.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Metro Connected
neighborhood_advantages.description: Walking distance to Aqua line node simplifies commuting.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative (requires instant occupation and clean legal registers)
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with office-going parents and young children
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT corridors (Sector 62/63/135/142) or South Delhi
persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by a critical need to eliminate commuting times while ensuring complete legal and registration safety for their property capital.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Express Zenith is a bulletproof ready-to-move-in choice for families searching for maximum transit utility in Central Noida. With direct Aqua Line connectivity at its doorstep and direct private builder bi-partite registries, it has zero delivery risk.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For residents, life here is exceptionally comfortable. Proximity to Spectrum Mall and various top schools ensures minimal transit stress. Secure, family-friendly atmosphere with an active and populated layout.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: While capital values have matured, steady regional job creation drives high-velocity rental demand. It is a premium wealth-defending asset.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Highly beneficial for school-going kids with Broadways and Manav Rachna schools within 1 km. Beautiful, safe central green lawns.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Offers consistent 4% rental yields and instant tenant onboarding due to Sector 76 metro station proximity.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Solid premium finishes including laminated wood flooring in master bedrooms, grand lobbies, and elegant facades, although lacking the custom ultra-luxury features of Dasnac Burj.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Exceptional legal clarity. No pending authority dues, active tripartite registrations, and complete pre-RERA clearances.
walk_away_conditions: Seeking a low-density luxury villa enclave.
negotiation_leverage: Use secondary market pricing comparisons from the older adjacent blocks to squeeze rates down on resale units.
Leverage minor cosmetic wear in resale blocks to negotiate discounts.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect time to acquire. Act immediately if clean registered resale units are available at approx ₹13,000 per sqft.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Significantly closer to the metro station (5 mins walk vs 15 mins); lower tower density and premium finishing standards.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Lower entry price per sqft; larger balconies and room layouts.
competitors.verdict: Express Zenith wins on transit location and structural finish; Antriksh Forest wins on lower per-sqft cost.
competitors.price_delta_note: Express Zenith is approx Rs 1,500/sqft more expensive than Antriksh Forest.
